message:
feat(server): add persistent replica primary connection and partial resync support

Refactor replica sync from one-shot to persistent connection model:
- Add ReplicaPrimaryConnection struct holding the TCP stream and read
  buffer for reuse across event loop ticks
- Rename maybe_run_replica_sync to drive_replica_sync, which maintains
  the connection across ticks and reads streaming replication commands
- sync_replica_with_primary now returns the connection for reuse
- read_available_stream_bytes returns (bytes, disconnected) tuple to
  detect primary disconnect for reconnection logic
- Use replica_psync_request() for PSYNC arguments, enabling partial
  resync with known replid+offset when state is "reconnect"
- Format runtime psync_request for line length compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
